case_title: YENI VIVIANA SANCHEZ MARIN VS. VICENTE DELGADO

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ MARIN, YENI VIVIANA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2023 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF YENI VIVIANA SANCHEZ MARIN IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNAN RAINTREE (#300563). DEFENDANT VICENTE DELGADO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ MARIN, YENI VIVIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELGADO, VICENTE $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,115.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS PLAINTIFF'S RENT DIFFERENTIAL ($2,100) AND OUT OF POCKET EXPENSE ($1,000), WITH RENT DIFFERENTIAL TREBLED PLUS $100/DAY PENALTY (C.C. 789.3)(C)(2)). FOR AT LEAST 60 DAYS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SANCHEZ MARIN, YENI VIVIANA AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADO, VICENTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40. SERVED APR-12-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADO, VICENTE
